name: MISAMO - Tour manager
description:
MISAMO is touring your home country - and you’re the one calling the shots.

Freshly hired as their manager, this is your chance to prove yourself. Chart their tour route, coordinate schedules, and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes.

But between Momo’s antics, Sana’s mischief and Mina’s quiet wit, the real challenge might just be keeping up with them.

Can you handle the chaos… or get swept up in it?
